<!--
Reminders before requesting review:
- Sentry-fixing PRs: include `Fixes JAVASCRIPT-NEXTJS-E4-<N>` in the body
  so the issue auto-resolves on the next release tag.
- Migration PRs: confirm Supabase Migrate dry-run is green and the new
  migration filename uses the `./scripts/new-migration.sh` helper.
- UI PRs: open .impeccable.md and confirm the change matches the
  Premium · Refined · Authentic personality + 4 anti-references.
